You are reviewing the baseline project in the current directory. Do NOT modify any files.

Tasks (perform in order):
1) Use the Bash tool to list the top-level contents (e.g., `ls -la`).
2) Use the Glob tool to list all Python files under src/.
3) Use the Read tool to read README.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
4) Use the Read tool to read src/app.py and src/utils.py.
5) Use the Grep tool to find TODO in src/.

Then provide:
- A short summary of what the project does.
- A bullet list of the files you read.
- The TODO items you found.
